name: io.github.ivannikolovbg/repull-mcp
description: Agent-friendly MCP for the Repull API — read-mostly access to reservations, properties, listings, guests, and conversations across 50+ PMS platforms and the major OTAs (Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO, Plumguide). Ships with built-in OpenAPI + docs discovery, a `whoami` introspection tool, cursor pagination, idempotency-key support on writes, and verbatim error envelopes (code, fix, docs_url) so agents can self-correct without escalating to a human.

environmentVariables.name: REPULL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Repull API key (sk_test_... or sk_live_...). Get one at https://repull.dev/dashboard.

environmentVariables.name: REPULL_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.repull.dev.
